function.name: rewrite_file
function.description: Replace the entire content of a file with new content. Use this when the change is large enough that search/replace blocks would be unwieldy, OR when the file is small enough (~few KB) that a full rewrite is cheaper than computing surgical blocks. Also use this to create a file that does not yet exist (within an allowlisted path). The file's prior content for prompt.md / memory.md is captured in plan 007's history; for other allowlisted files there is no automatic history.

file_path.description: Path relative to the guild dir; must be allowlisted.
